/usr/bin/clang++ -g -stdlib=libc++ -m64 -fuse-ld=lld -lc++ -lc++abi -lm -lubsan -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/b+tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/cow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/flat_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/flat_set.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/small_vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/vector_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vm_unit_tests.dir/vm_vector.cpp.o -o vm_unit_tests  ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../libpsi_vm.a ../lib/libgtest.a ../_deps/container-build/libboost_container.a ../_deps/mimalloc-build/libmimalloc-debug.a -lpthread -lrt -latomic
